proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_midostaurin=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_midostaurin=0.
Patients receiving treatment_gilteritinib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_gilteritinib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_ivosidenib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_ivosidenib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_enasidenib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_enasidenib=0.
Patients receiving treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.
Patients receiving treatment_7plus3=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those with treatment_7plus3=0.

analyses.result_summary: ORR treatment_midostaurin=0.169 (n=7545) vs no_treatment_midostaurin=0.169 (n=42455); diff=-0.001; chi2 p=0.923
ORR treatment_gilteritinib=0.163 (n=7545) vs no_treatment_gilteritinib=0.170 (n=42455); diff=-0.007; chi2 p=0.134
ORR treatment_ivosidenib=0.171 (n=3938) vs no_treatment_ivosidenib=0.169 (n=46062); diff=+0.002; chi2 p=0.763
ORR treatment_enasidenib=0.161 (n=3972) vs no_treatment_enasidenib=0.170 (n=46028); diff=-0.009; chi2 p=0.172
ORR treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.173 (n=20020) vs no_treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0.166 (n=29980); diff=+0.007; chi2 p=0.0315
ORR treatment_7plus3=0.170 (n=22580) vs no_treatment_7plus3=0.168 (n=27420); diff=+0.002; chi2 p=0.54

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with flt3_itd=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with flt3_tkd=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with idh1_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with idh2_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with npm1_mutation=1 have a higher objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with tp53_mutation=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with complex_karyotype=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.
Patients with secondary_aml=1 have a lower objective_response rate than those without.

analyses.result_summary: ORR idh1_mutation=0.221 (n=3624) vs no_idh1_mutation=0.165 (n=46376); diff=+0.056; chi2 p=3.52e-18

ORR npm1_mutation=0.173 (n=15014) vs no_npm1_mutation=0.167 (n=34986); diff=+0.006; chi2 p=0.109
ORR tp53_mutation=0.166 (n=4985) vs no_tp53_mutation=0.169 (n=45015); diff=-0.004; chi2 p=0.52
ORR complex_karyotype=0.168 (n=7462) vs no_complex_karyotype=0.169 (n=42538); diff=-0.001; chi2 p=0.818
ORR secondary_aml=0.169 (n=12301) vs no_secondary_aml=0.169 (n=37699); diff=-0.000; chi2 p=0.915

proposed_hypotheses.text: FLT3-ITD-positive patients show greater objective_response benefit from treatment_midostaurin than FLT3-ITD-negative patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: FLT3-ITD × midostaurin: interaction beta=-0.105 (OR=0.90, p=0.219). ORR FLT3+/mido+=0.161, FLT3+/mido-=0.174, FLT3-/mido+=0.170, FLT3-/mido-=0.168

proposed_hypotheses.text: FLT3-ITD-positive patients show greater objective_response benefit from treatment_gilteritinib than FLT3-ITD-negative patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: FLT3-ITD × gilteritinib: beta=+0.034 (OR=1.03, p=0.686). ORR FLT3+/gilt+=0.169, FLT3+/gilt-=0.172, FLT3-/gilt+=0.162, FLT3-/gilt-=0.170

proposed_hypotheses.text: idh1_mutation-positive patients show greater objective_response benefit from treatment_ivosidenib than idh1_mutation-negative patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: IDH1 × ivosidenib: beta=-0.364 (OR=0.69, p=0.0271). ORR IDH1+/ivo+=0.174, IDH1+/ivo-=0.225, IDH1-/ivo+=0.171, IDH1-/ivo-=0.164

proposed_hypotheses.text: idh2_mutation-positive patients show greater objective_response benefit from treatment_enasidenib than idh2_mutation-negative patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: IDH2 × enasidenib: beta=-0.124 (OR=0.88, p=0.448). ORR IDH2+/ena+=0.144, IDH2+/ena-=0.167, IDH2-/ena+=0.163, IDH2-/ena-=0.170

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher age_years is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Patients flagged unfit_for_intensive=1 have a lower objective_response rate than fit patients.
Higher wbc_k_per_ul is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher blast_pct_marrow is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response rate (better nutrition).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response rate (more inflammation).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower objective_response rate.
tp53_mutation-positive patients have a relatively lower objective_response benefit from treatment_7plus3 than TP53-negative patients (negative interaction).
tp53_mutation-positive patients have a relatively lower objective_response benefit from treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine than TP53-negative patients (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: TP53 × treatment_7plus3: beta=-0.044 (OR=0.96, p=0.588). ORR TP53+/treatment_7plus3+=0.164, TP53+/treatment_7plus3-=0.167, TP53-/treatment_7plus3+=0.171, TP53-/treatment_7plus3-=0.168

proposed_hypotheses.text: npm1_mutation-positive patients have a greater objective_response benefit from treatment_7plus3 than NPM1-negative patients (positive interaction).
complex_karyotype-positive patients have a relatively lower objective_response benefit from treatment_7plus3 than complex_karyotype-negative patients (negative interaction).
complex_karyotype-positive patients have a relatively lower objective_response benefit from treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine than complex_karyotype-negative patients (negative interaction).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have a different objective_response rate than males.
Rural-residing patients (rural_residence=1) have a lower objective_response rate than urban patients.
Higher education_years is associated with higher objective_response rate.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Objective_response rate differs across race_ethnicity categories.
Objective_response rate differs across insurance_type categories.
unfit_for_intensive-positive patients have a greater objective_response benefit from treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine than fit patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: unfit × venaza: beta=+0.104 (OR=1.11, p=0.0362). ORR unfit/venaza+=0.179, unfit/venaza-=0.163, fit/venaza+=0.170, fit/venaza-=0.168

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps reduces the objective_response benefit of treatment_7plus3 (negative interaction; intensive therapy works less well in poor PS patients).
Patients in the favorable risk group (NPM1-positive AND FLT3-ITD-negative) have a higher objective_response rate than non-favorable patients.
Patients in the adverse risk group (TP53-positive OR complex_karyotype) have a lower objective_response rate than non-adverse patients.

analyses.result_summary: ORR favorable=0.172 (n=12035) vs non-favorable=0.168 (n=37965); diff=+0.004; chi2 p=0.3
ORR adverse=0.168 (n=11679) vs non-adverse=0.169 (n=38321); diff=-0.002; chi2 p=0.637

proposed_hypotheses.text: Adjusting for confounders in a multivariable logistic regression, ECOG performance status remains the dominant predictor of objective_response (negative coefficient).
After multivariable adjustment, idh1_mutation remains a positive independent predictor of objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, higher albumin_g_dl remains an independent positive predictor of objective_response.
After multivariable adjustment, higher blast_pct_marrow remains an independent negative predictor of objective_response.

analyses.code: logit on full model; report ecog_ps
analyses.result_summary: ecog_ps adj beta=-0.3842 (OR=0.681, p=2.65e-97); dominant signal in adjusted model.

analyses.code: logit on full model; report idh1_mutation
logit on full model; report albumin_g_dl
logit on full model; report blast_pct_marrow

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher cough_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher platelets_k_ul is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher anc_k_ul is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher alc_k_ul is associated with higher objective_response.
flt3_tkd-positive patients have a greater objective_response benefit from treatment_midostaurin than FLT3-TKD-negative patients (positive interaction).
flt3_tkd-positive patients have a greater objective_response benefit from treatment_gilteritinib than FLT3-TKD-negative patients (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: FLT3-TKD × treatment_midostaurin: beta=+0.023 (OR=1.02, p=0.873). ORR TKD+/treatment_midostaurin+=0.165, TKD+/treatment_midostaurin-=0.162, TKD-/treatment_midostaurin+=0.169, TKD-/treatment_midostaurin-=0.170

FLT3-TKD × treatment_gilteritinib: beta=-0.152 (OR=0.86, p=0.327). ORR TKD+/treatment_gilteritinib+=0.141, TKD+/treatment_gilteritinib-=0.166, TKD-/treatment_gilteritinib+=0.164, TKD-/treatment_gilteritinib-=0.170

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older patients (higher age_years) gain less objective_response benefit from treatment_7plus3 than younger patients (negative interaction).
tp53_mutation-positive patients gain less objective_response benefit from treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine than TP53-negative patients (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: TP53 × venaza: beta=-0.087 (OR=0.92, p=0.285). ORR TP53+/venaza+=0.164, TP53+/venaza-=0.167, TP53-/venaza+=0.175, TP53-/venaza-=0.166

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving biomarker-matched targeted therapy (FLT3-mutated on midostaurin/gilteritinib, IDH1-mutated on ivosidenib, IDH2-mutated on enasidenib) have a higher objective_response rate than unmatched patients.

After adjusting for age_years, ecog_ps, tp53_mutation, complex_karyotype, secondary_aml, albumin_g_dl, and nlr, biomarker-matched targeted therapy is independently associated with higher objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: ORR matched=0.163 (n=4144) vs unmatched=0.170 (n=45856); diff=-0.006; chi2 p=0.299

analyses.code: logit('objective_response ~ matched_therapy + age_years + ecog_ps + tp53_mutation + complex_karyotype + secondary_aml + albumin_g_dl + nlr', df)
